final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Preferred granular recurring interest components over total finance-cost rows. Included the lease-interest label used in 2025 and the separate interest/lease-interest rows used in earlier years; excluded fair value, FX, and total financial expense lines.

candidates.row_label: Share of income of equity accounted companies

candidates.why: Asset line, not shareholders' equity.
Direct equity line on balance sheet; preferred over Total Equity when available.
Also an equity line, but less preferred than Shareholders equity because both are present and numerically identical.

variables.notes: Using a priority list for equity labels. Prefer 'Shareholders equity'; 'Total Equity' is included as a fallback label across years. No separate non-controlling interest line is present.
No minority interest/non-controlling interest line appears on the balance sheet. Since BE uses the total/common equity line and no NCI is separately reported, MIB is set to empty.
